name: bricks-mcp
description: MCP (Model Context Protocol) server for WordPress AI integration
author: Cristian Uibar <cristi@buffup.media>

scripts.test: wp-env run tests-cli bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && php vendor/bin/phpunit'
scripts.test:unit: wp-env run tests-cli bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && php vendor/bin/phpunit --testsuite unit'
scripts.lint: wp-env run cli bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpcs'
scripts.lint:fix: wp-env run cli bash -c 'cd /var/www/html/wp-content/plugins/bricks-mcp && php -d memory_limit=512M vendor/bin/phpcbf'
scripts.make:pot: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot . languages/bricks-mcp.pot --domain=bricks-mcp
scripts.info: wp-env run cli wp plugin list
